title: WatchCommandRequest
description: Payload sent from the Apple Watch (via iPhone proxy) to the OpenClaw backend to execute an audio command.

audio_data.description: Base64 encoded audio recorded from the Apple Watch.

format.description: The format of the audio data. Preferred is m4a or aac for bandwidth efficiency between Watch and iPhone.

client_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the recording was completed on the client.
